# BarShelf

> BarShelf is a macOS menu-bar app that renders native "widgets" from a JSON
> view tree. Widgets are directories with a `widget.json` manifest plus an
> entry file (a shell command, a declarative workflow, or a Deno TypeScript
> script). This file points agents and tools at the authoring docs. The
> canonical, self-contained authoring spec is AGENTS.md.

## Widget authoring (start here)

- [AGENTS.md — full widget authoring spec for agents](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/AGENTS.md): manifest schema, exec/workflow/script decision rule, UINode catalog, settings, appearance, permissions, triggers, build/test loop, and 3 worked examples. Also available via `mbk agent-spec`.
- [WIDGET-SPEC.md — manifest & UINode reference](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/WIDGET-SPEC.md)
- [WORKFLOW.md — declarative workflow sources/transforms/templates](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/WORKFLOW.md)
- [SCRIPT-RUNTIME.md — Deno TypeScript SDK and host APIs](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/SCRIPT-RUNTIME.md)

## Tooling & publishing

- [MBK.md — the `mbk` developer CLI (new/validate/pack/install/list/agent-spec)](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/MBK.md)
- [GETTING-STARTED.md](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/GETTING-STARTED.md)
- [INSTALLING-WIDGETS.md — install URL contract](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/INSTALLING-WIDGETS.md)
- [REGISTRY.md — gallery registry entries (category, screenshot)](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/REGISTRY.md)
- [PUBLISHING.md](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/docs/PUBLISHING.md)

## Schemas

- [widget-0.1.json — manifest JSON Schema](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/schema/widget-0.1.json)
- [uinode-0.1.json — view-tree JSON Schema](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/schema/uinode-0.1.json)
- [workflow-0.1.json — workflow JSON Schema](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/schema/workflow-0.1.json)
- [registry-0.1.json — registry JSON Schema](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/schema/registry-0.1.json)

## SDK

- [sdk/mod.ts — the `barshelf` script SDK (ui, action, mb.* host APIs)](https://github.com/Open330/barshelf/blob/master/sdk/mod.ts)
